description: A painting depicting a group of young Russian women on a riverbank, apparently dressing or changing after bathing. The women wear brightly colored clothing — red, blue, yellow, and pink skirts and blouses. One woman holds up a red garment, another bends to adjust her clothing. A small naked child stands among them. The style features Petrov-Vodkin's characteristic flattened perspective, bold coloring, and monumental treatment of everyday subjects. The Volga River and distant landscape are visible in the background. No biblical or religious content is present.
